notes: Routing eval has not been executed because Phase A was implemented headlessly (no interactive Claude Code session available to the agent). The user must run the eval manually after checkout. See plan file section 'Task 19' Steps 7-10 for the exact procedure.

plugin_install.expected: Install succeeds, no errors about missing fields or invalid frontmatter.
plugin_install.notes: If install fails, rerun with `claude --debug plugin install --scope user $(pwd) 2>&1 | tail -50`.

paper_new.expected: Wizard runs, writes .paper-config.yml, scaffolds main.tex + sections/ + Makefile.

paper_compile.expected: pdflatex runs, non-empty build/main.pdf produced. Skip if TeX distribution not installed.

acceptance_criteria.v2_baseline_regression: TODO - evals/evals.json must be within 5% of v2 baseline (spec 3.11 criterion 6)
